metadata.source: Beiler et al. 2010/2015 - Douglas fir mycorrhizal network
metadata.dataNote: Network topology (trees, genets, edges) based on molecular identification of shared fungal genets in Beiler et al. 2010. Nutrient flow directions and magnitudes are illustrative, informed by isotope tracing studies (Simard 1997, Klein 2016). Confidence levels indicate strength of evidence for each connection type.
